author: Aaron Bockelie
description: Give Claude Desktop and other AI assistants semantic access to your notes through a built-in Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Aaron Bockelie
manifest.description: Read, write, search, and traverse your vault from Claude Desktop and any AI assistant — via a built-in MCP server, no external server to run.
manifest.name: Semantic Notes Vault MCP

name: Semantic Notes Vault MCP

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.40

Fix Obsidian plugin-directory review finding: remove the word "Obsidian" from the manifest description (redundant in-directory).

### Claude Desktop (.mcpb connector)
If you connect Claude Desktop via the `.mcpb` bundle, re-import `obsidian-mcp.mcpb` from this release to update the connector — BRAT updates only the Obsidian plugin, not the Desktop bridge.

### Installation via BRAT (Obsidian plugin)
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.39...0.11.40

releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.38

Docs & positioning release (no code changes since 0.11.37). Rewrites the community-directory short description and README opening to lead with concrete capabilities — read, write, search, traverse — the native no-external-server architecture, and permission controls (read-only mode, per-operation, path allow/block). Drops insider 'semantic' framing. Also folds in the live dataview GROUP BY fixes already shipped in 0.11.37.

### Claude Desktop (.mcpb connector)
If you connect Claude Desktop via the `.mcpb` bundle, re-import `obsidian-mcp.mcpb` from this release to update the connector — BRAT updates only the Obsidian plugin, not the Desktop bridge.

### Installation via BRAT (Obsidian plugin)
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

## What's Changed
* docs(readme): lead with concrete verbs + the native/no-server edge by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/256
* docs: rewrite community-directory short description by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/257


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.37...0.11.38

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.36

Session-recovery cluster + bridge boot fix + hono security bump. **Supersedes 0.11.34 and 0.11.35 — do not use those** (their bundled bridge was broken).

### ⚠️ Claude Desktop users — re-import the `.mcpb` bundle
This release fixes the **Claude Desktop bridge itself** (#243, #247), which lives **inside the `.mcpb`**. BRAT updates only the Obsidian plugin, **not** the Desktop connector — updating the plugin alone will *not* deliver these fixes. To upgrade the connector:
1. Download **`obsidian-mcp.mcpb`** below (or the version-stamped `obsidian-mcp-0.11.36.mcpb`).
2. Claude Desktop → Settings → Extensions → re-import it. Desktop reads the higher version (0.11.36) and upgrades the connector.
3. Restart Claude Desktop. Re-enter the vault URL + API key from the plugin's Settings tab if prompted.

Obsidian-only and Claude Code (HTTP transport) users get the server-side fixes through the plugin update alone — no `.mcpb` action needed.

### Changes
- **Bridge self-heal (#243):** on session loss (idle eviction, Obsidian reload, plugin update) the bridge transparently re-initializes and replays the failed call — no more "Session expired" dead-ends or multi-minute timeouts. Validated end-to-end on Claude Desktop.
- **Bridge bootstrap (#247):** starts under Claude Desktop's built-in-Node loader (fixes the 0.11.34 regression where the connector hung ~60s and never connected).
- **SSE notify-stream (#244):** exempt the long-lived GET stream from the 120s idle socket reap, stopping reconnect churn.
- **Security:** transitive `hono` 4.12.23 → 4.12.27, clearing GHSA-wwfh-h76j-fc44 (serve-static path traversal — unused path here, but flagged).

### Installation via BRAT (Obsidian plugin)
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.35...0.11.36
releases.name: Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.36

## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.33

Re-cut 0.11.33 (#230): McpServer wrapper drops the deprecated Server reference — clears the last Obsidian-review warnings. Plus prior 0.11.33 fixes (graph .mcpignore, lint debt, window timers/globalThis/setClass, hono security bump).

### Installation via BRAT
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

## What's Changed
* fix(graph): honor MCP ignore exclusions in graph traversal by @fa1k3 in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/222
* docs(readme): lead with install + emoji .mcpb→Claude Desktop banner by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/223
* chore: adopt dev-dependency bump + clear lint debt (supersedes #217) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/225
* fix: pass Obsidian source-code review — window timers + globalThis (closes #226) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/227
* fix: pass Obsidian review — drop deprecated setWarning (closes the 0.11.33 gating Error) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/229
* docs: exempt security fixes from the 7-day supply-chain hold by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/228
* chore(deps): bump hono from 4.12.18 to 4.12.23 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/218
* refactor(mcp): drop deprecated Server reference via McpServer wrapper by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/230


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.32...0.11.33

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.27

### Changes
- fix(mcp): debug route no longer shadows the GET /mcp standalone SSE stream; GET and POST both reach the transport, DELETE session-close preserved (from #126 / #196)
- perf(edit): two-row Levenshtein plus heuristics for edit.window fuzzy matching — O(n) memory, no per-line matrix allocation (#196)
- feat(vault): combine returns combined content inline when destination is omitted — read-only multi-file retrieval with no side effects (#193)
- security(docs): replaced the claude-mcp-add --header guidance with a safe config-file approach (the CLI echoes the bearer token to stdout and the macOS unified log); native HTTP transport plus proper self-signed-cert trust docs (#192)
- docs(adr): ADR-104 — worker-thread offload and SSE route decision (#191)

Known/tracked: worker offload for edit.window is not yet active (#197). Prerelease for BRAT testing.

### Installation via BRAT
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

## What's Changed
* docs(adr): ADR-104 — worker offload + SSE deconfliction (gate for #126) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/191
* security(docs): safe MCP config approach (reimplements #143) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/192
* feat(vault): combine returns inline when destination omitted (reimplements #146) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/193
* fix(mcp): debug route no longer shadows GET /mcp SSE stream + two-row Levenshtein (from #126) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/196


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.26...0.11.27
releases.name: Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.27

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.26

Prerelease for BRAT testing. Headline change to verify: Bases filter and formula expressions are now evaluated by a sandboxed parser (expression-eval) instead of new Function, so arbitrary JavaScript, this, and prototype access no longer execute (ADR-201, issue 180). Behavioural parity was proven against the old path via a differential corpus. Please exercise real .base files (filters and formulas) and report any expression that no longer evaluates as before. Also includes scorecard tooling (183/165) and ADR-103 on TLS cert storage, with no runtime impact.

### Installation via BRAT
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

## What's Changed
* test(bases): differential corpus + new Function baseline (ADR-201, PR 1/2) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/185
* feat(bases): sandboxed expression evaluator — replace new Function (ADR-201, PR 2/2) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/186
* fix(scorecard): re-anchor parser to redesigned Obsidian portal (#183) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/187
* docs(adr): ADR-103 — TLS cert/key storage strategy for localhost HTTPS (#7) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/188
* feat(scorecard): scheduled regression gate vs committed baseline (#165) by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/189


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.25...0.11.26

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.19

Agent ergonomics for vault.list pagination (#158)

- Paginated vault.list now recurses when a directory is given; page N is the Nth slice of the same flat universe as the non-paginated call.
- Formatter surfaces concrete next-call hints when truncating (page/pageSize to continue) and when more pages exist (Page X of Y).
- Fixed latent formatter bug: structured response branch now distinguishes folders from files (was lumping them all into Files).

### Installation via BRAT
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

## What's Changed
* feat(vault.list): Coherent pagination + agent next-call hints by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/158


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.18...0.11.19
releases.name: Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.19

releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.18

Bug fixes and contributor PRs:
- fix(vault): listFiles now recurses for folder-of-folders (#154)
- fix(formatters): extract error text from fetch_web content array (#145, thanks @laplaque)
- fix(system): report both HTTP and HTTPS ports in system info (#144, thanks @laplaque)
- chore(deps): clear 13 audit vulnerabilities (1 critical, 6 high) via dependabot batch + npm audit fix

### Installation via BRAT
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

## What's Changed
* chore(deps-dev): Bump handlebars from 4.7.8 to 4.7.9 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/113
* chore(deps-dev): Bump flatted from 3.3.3 to 3.4.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/110
* chore(deps-dev): Bump brace-expansion from 1.1.12 to 5.0.6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/114
* ci: Bump actions/github-script from 8 to 9 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/129
* chore(deps): Bump the production-dependencies group across 1 directory with 5 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/148

releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.16

### Added
- Tree-based MCP tool visibility gating — granular control over which tools agents can see and call
- Tri-state tree UI in plugin settings with per-operation and per-action toggles
- Defense-in-depth runtime check for disabled actions
- ADR-101 (tool visibility architecture) and ADR-200 (CLI parity gap analysis)

### Changed
- Protocol information section now reflects tool visibility state with counts

### Installation via BRAT
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Semantic Notes Vault MCP 0.11.13

### Fixes
- graph.path now correctly returns paths between connected notes (#88)
- graph.backlinks and graph.forwardlinks show proper link lists instead of orphan stats
- Tag operations (tag-analysis, shared-tags, tag-traverse) now read frontmatter YAML tags
- Daily Notes folder read from Obsidian config instead of hardcoded (#94)
- dailyNotesFolder exposed in system.info for AI tools
- Use Obsidian built-in getAllTags instead of custom helpers
- Merged 7 dependabot security/dependency updates

### Installation via BRAT
1. Install the BRAT plugin if you haven't already
2. Command palette → "BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing"
3. Enter: `aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin`
4. Enable the plugin in Community Plugins

## What's Changed
* chore(deps): Bump @hono/node-server from 1.19.9 to 1.19.10 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/101
* chore(deps): Bump hono from 4.11.4 to 4.12.7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/102
* chore(deps): Bump the production-dependencies group across 1 directory with 4 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/89
* chore(deps): Bump qs from 6.14.1 to 6.14.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/91
* chore(deps-dev): Bump the development-dependencies group across 1 directory with 6 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/92
* chore(deps): Bump ajv by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/95
* ci: Bump actions/upload-artifact from 5 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/99
* chore(deps): Bump express-rate-limit from 8.2.1 to 8.3.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/105
* fix: Graph path, forwardlinks, backlinks, and tag operations by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/103
* fix: Read Daily Notes folder from Obsidian config by @aaronsb in https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/pull/104


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aaronsb/obsidian-mcp-plugin/compare/0.11.12...0.11.13
